name: Desearch
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN22 using the official Desearch website, docs, public OpenAPI schema, console, and source repository. The OpenAPI schema advertises api.desearch.ai as the API server; protected method calls require separate review before proxy eligibility. Confirmed the schema's global security requirement (ApiKeyAuth) applies to all 35 documented paths with no exceptions -- the only genuinely public surfaces on this host are the base URL, /health, and the OpenAPI schema itself, all already tracked. 4 surfaces had no probe config at all -- the registry-wide gap tracked in #5932 -- fixed.

surfaces.notes: Official Desearch website for SN22.

surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI schema for the Desearch API.

auth.name: Authorization
auth.scopes_note: Derived from the subnet's own OpenAPI securitySchemes (ApiKeyAuth).

surfaces.name: Desearch API
surfaces.notes: Public API host advertised by the Desearch OpenAPI schema. Protected methods require authentication, so proxy eligibility requires separate review.
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: OpenAPI schema is public; method-level auth and rate limits must be reviewed before routing.

surfaces.name: Desearch Taopedia article
surfaces.notes: Discovered from the public Taopedia article repository. Not protocol authority.

surfaces.name: Desearch Tensorplex subnet docs
surfaces.notes: Discovered from Tensorplex subnet-docs. Useful as documentation enrichment, not verified operational authority.

surfaces.name: Desearch TaoMarketCap dashboard
surfaces.notes: Universal TaoMarketCap subnet dashboard candidate. Third-party enrichment, not protocol authority.

surfaces.name: Desearch Search Evals (Hugging Face)
surfaces.notes: Public CC-BY-4.0 Hugging Face dataset of Desearch search-quality evaluations, published and documented in the official Desearch-ai/desearch-search-evals repo.

surfaces.name: Desearch search benchmark dataset
surfaces.notes: Public Desearch (SN22) HuggingFace benchmark of ~196k fresh web + X search questions (id/question/difficulty/date-window columns), regenerated daily from recent news and posts; not gated, no answer keys. Distinct from the already-registered search-evals results dataset. The subnet-22 README (source) declares the Bittensor subnet and the desearch HF org owns it.

surfaces.name: Desearch API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /health on api.desearch.ai returning API liveness JSON (observed: {"status":"health"}). Served on the API host advertised by the Desearch OpenAPI schemas (www.desearch.ai/openapi.json and api.desearch.ai/openapi.json) alongside the existing sn-22-desearch-api surface.

auth.scopes_note: Derived from the subnet's own OpenAPI securitySchemes (ApiKeyAuth) — global security on api.desearch.ai/openapi.json.
